stake_1.npc_text: You. You're the one who pulled the fire alarm, aren't you?

choices.text: Me? I was just... yes. Yes I was.

stake_2.npc_text: Do you know how many OKRs you just disrupted? We have a KPI for average time-to-desk. You've tanked it.

choices.text: Happy to help. I hear Amazon loves disruption.

stake_3.npc_text: We disrupt markets. Not fire drills. There is a Leadership Principle for this.

choices.text: Which one — 'Invent and Simplify'? I simplified getting inside.

stake_4.npc_text: *sighs deeply* What do you actually want?

choices.text: I just need to sign some paperwork and leave. Very customer-obsessed — I'm the customer.

stake_5.npc_text: Bob's office is down the hall. And next time — just email ahead. We have a ticketing system.

choices.text: What's the response time on that?

stake_6.npc_text: Four to six business days. It's backlogged.
